chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 3526 of 2019 _________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________ (Priority). 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 15866/19. 2. For hearing of main case. -------------- 16.10.2024. Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Syed Hussain Shah, AAG. ------------------ Counsel for the Petitioner pleads no instructions as they have returned the brief; whereas, no one is present on behalf of the Petitioner. In view of above position, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
